title: Anvil Workbench advanced chat instruction template v1
description: A named, actor-private, digest-pinned Advanced-mode instruction template (advanced-model-playground T009). The body text and its declared substitutions are DECLARED, inspectable instructions (content_trust=untrusted_task_data) — never a covert prompt: a preset references a template by id + digest, the template's full text and substitutions are visible pre-send, and selecting it records the resolved text as declared run instructions. The template is contract-digest-bearing (template_digest) for tamper evidence; a live digest drift or removal is detectable and deterministic and opens the volatile repair block into repair_required, never a silent substitution. No credential, endpoint, url, header, path, or hidden-reasoning field is representable.

body.description: The full declared instruction text. content_trust marks it as untrusted task data that becomes declared, inspectable run instructions — never a covert injected prompt.

substitutions.description: The declared, named substitution slots the body exposes. Each is named and inspectable pre-send; a value bound to an undeclared name is refused, so no hidden binding can shadow a declared one.

repair.description: The volatile drift/repair state. Excluded from the template_digest so the same content hashes identically regardless of current live-drift state.
